reply.text: Im pressing charges for emotional damage I was not ready to see

messages.text: that dumbbell on the floor attacked my peace first
spiritually folded when i saw gym floor thirst traps
blame the carpet, it started the seduction
nah the carpet not holding a dumbbell hostage
i gave it rights, emotional support dumbbell actually 👀
you got jokes, now show it
they sprinted straight to therapy when i zoomed in
therapist saw the pic and renewed his membership
he probably skipped leg day after seeing that angle
he skipped leg day, never skipped viewing day tho
terrible security, i still got traumatized courtside
courtside seats to my workout is wild privilege
saturday night. i'll pick you up
